news.summary: Assemblyman Clyde Vanel has introduced a new proposal to explore the potential of blockchain technology in enhancing the security of voter records and election outcomes. The proposal aims to assess the feasibility of utilizing blockchain to protect voter information and ensure the integrity of election results. This initiative comes at a critical time when concerns over election security are mounting, with instances of tampering and hacking on the rise. By leveraging blockchain's decentralized and immutable nature, the proposal seeks to bolster the transparency and trustworthiness of the electoral process. Vanel's proposal has garnered attention for its innovative approach, signaling a potential shift towards harnessing blockchain in the realm of election security.
news.headline: NY bill by Assemblyman Clyde Vanel suggests using blockchain to protect election data for enhanced security measures.

news.summary: AMG Critical Materials N.V. has approved a capital investment of USD $15 million to set up an aluminothermic production plant for chrome metal in the United States. The facility, with a yearly capacity of 6,500 tons, will be situated near AMG Titanium’s site in New Castle, Pennsylvania. It is projected to become operational by the first quarter of 2026.
news.headline: AMG to invest $15M in US chrome plant with 6,500-ton capacity, to start operation in Q1 2026.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Idorsia Ltd (SIX: IDIA) released a study titled "Aprocitentan for Blood Pressure Reduction in Black Patients" in the April issue of Hypertension. The research focuses on the efficacy, tolerability, and safety of aprocitentan, a once-daily, orally active, dual endothelin receptor antagonist developed by Idorsia. This analysis, based on the Phase 3 PRECISION study involving patients with confirmed resistant hypertension, particularly examined African American patients. The study revealed that aprocitentan, when added to a regimen of at least three antihypertensive medications (four in over 50% of patients), led to significant and sustained reductions in blood pressure levels. Additionally, aprocitentan notably decreased proteinuria in patients with baseline proteinuria. The findings highlighted the safety and tolerability of aprocitentan, even in Black patients suffering from chronic kidney disease.
news.headline: Aprocitentan reduces BP and proteinuria in Black patients with resistant hypertension. Clinically significant results in Phase 3 study.

news.summary: On 9 April 2025, in Antwerp, Belgium, VGP, a prominent pan-European company specializing in logistics, industrial real estate, and renewable energy, revealed the selection of Mr. Chris Morrish to its Board of Directors. With extensive expertise in the real estate industry, Mr. Morrish's appointment aims to enhance VGP's board. His nomination will be presented for ratification at the Annual General Meeting set for 9 May 2025.
news.headline: VGP appoints Chris Morrish as new Board member to boost real estate expertise. Vote on proposal on 9th May 2025.

news.summary: In Saint Herblain (France) and Schlieren (Zurich) on April 9, 2025, Valneva SE (Nasdaq: VALN; Euronext Paris: VLA), a specialized vaccine company, and LimmaTech Biologics AG, a clinical-stage biotech firm focusing on developing vaccines for serious diseases, shared that the initial participant has been vaccinated in a Phase 2 study for infant safety and immunogenicity of Shigella4V2 (S4V2). S4V2 is the most advanced tetravalent bioconjugate vaccine candidate globally against shigellosis, which aims to combat life-threatening effects.
news.headline: Valneva and LimmaTech start Phase 2 Infant Study on tetravalent Shigella vaccine with first participant vaccinated.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous 5.1%. It was also highlighted that the economy added a total of 250,000 new jobs in the past month, exceeding the initial forecast of 200,000 jobs. Additionally, the data showed that the inflation rate remained stable at 2.5%, leading to positive projections for future economic growth. The stock market responded positively to these developments, with the major indexes all recording gains. Overall, the economic outlook appears promising as key indicators continue to show improvement.
news.headline: Notice for the Annual Shareholders’ Meeting and Special Shareholders’ Meeting on 9 May 2025.

news.summary: Entrepreneur and early Bitcoin investor Mark Cuban reiterated his support for the cryptocurrency, calling it a "better version of gold" in a recent interview. He highlighted Bitcoin's ability to serve as a hedge against economic downturns similar to gold, while also emphasizing its convenience in terms of accessibility and ease of international transactions. Cuban's remarks coincided with Bitcoin's surge past $100,000 for the first time in history. As of April 2025, Bitcoin continues to attract attention and support from influential figures like Cuban amid global economic uncertainties.
news.headline: Mark Cuban touts Bitcoin over gold in the face of economic turmoil, praising its ease of use as BTC surpasses $100,000.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, following a -3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Emerging markets and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 6.3% this year. However, advanced economies are expected to see a growth rate of 5.8%. The global trade volume is projected to increase by 8.4% in 2021, following a decline of 5.3% in the previous year. Additionally, inflation rates are predicted to rise across various regions, with advanced economies experiencing a 1.7% increase and emerging markets facing a 4.7% rise. These projections suggest a positive outlook for the global economy in the coming months.
news.headline: Japan is seeking an early tariff deal with US as officials worry; shares drop.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Idorsia Ltd (SIX: IDIA) revealed that the US Food & Drug Administration (FDA) has officially approved the updated label for TRYVIO™ (aprocitentan). This decision comes after the FDA previously lifted TRYVIO from its REMS (Risk Evaluation and Mitigation Strategy) requirement on March 17, 2025. TRYVIO, Idorsia’s dual endothelin receptor antagonist (ERA), is designed for treating systemic hypertension in conjunction with other antihypertensives to reduce blood pressure in patients not adequately managed by other medications. The FDA ruled that a REMS was no longer needed to ensure that the benefits of TRYVIO outweigh the risk of embryo-fetal toxicity and that the product labeling effectively conveys safety information.
news.headline: US FDA approves updated label for TRYVIO, removing REMS requirement by Idorsia Ltd; dual ERA for hypertension.

news.summary: On Tuesday, the stock market experienced a downturn after initially showing significant increases due to the impending enforcement of substantial tariffs by Trump starting Wednesday. Notably, Apple and Tesla saw declines in their stock values. The Dow Jones Futures took a hit, while yields surged in response to the commencement of the broad Trump tariffs.
news.headline: Stock market tumbles as Trump tariffs start; Dow Jones futures down, Apple and Tesla decline. Yields surge.

news.summary: A recent report states that the global economic growth is projected to reach 5.8% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction last year. This rebound is being driven by strong performances in countries like the US and China, with forecasts suggesting a growth rate of 6.4% and 8.4% respectively. Emerging market and developing economies are also expected to grow by 6% this year. However, the report highlights the uneven distribution of vaccines as a major obstacle to a sustained recovery, with low-income countries facing challenges in accessing vaccines. Vaccination rollouts are crucial for not only public health but also economic revival, with estimates suggesting that every 1% increase in the global vaccination rate could add $9 billion to the world economy. The report emphasizes the importance of global cooperation in ensuring equal vaccine distribution and a comprehensive recovery from the economic impacts of the pandemic.
news.headline: Khazanah of Malaysia reports challenges in exiting private assets amid current conditions.

news.summary: In recent findings, it has been reported that last year, approximately 1.5 million people lost their jobs due to the economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. The unemployment rate rose to 8.5%, marking a significant increase compared to previous years. Additionally, it was noted that around 750,000 businesses were forced to close permanently as a result of the crisis. These alarming statistics shed light on the far-reaching impacts of the pandemic on both individuals and the economy as a whole.
news.headline: Spain urges EU to turn to China amid Trump tariffs.

news.summary: The latest data reveals a significant increase in job growth, with the economy adding 250,000 new jobs in the past month. This surge has lowered the unemployment rate to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Additionally, average hourly earnings rose by 3.2% compared to the same period last year, indicating positive wage growth for workers. The job market is showing strong signs of recovery and stability, reflecting a promising outlook for the economy.
news.headline: Spanish Prime Minister urges EU to reconsider ties with China.

news.summary: A news report states that there has been a significant rise in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported. The spike in cases has led to a record number of hospitalizations, with 500 individuals being admitted for treatment. Additionally, there have been 50 new fatalities attributed to the virus, bringing the total death toll to 300. These numbers underscore the importance of continued vigilance and adherence to safety protocols to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Indonesian Rupiah hits record low vs USD amid trade tension.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%. This decrease marks a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.1%. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has increased to 62.8%, showcasing a positive trend in employment. These numbers indicate a promising outlook for the job market and overall economic growth in the country.
news.headline: Malaysia's investment fund, Khazanah, faces challenges in exiting private assets due to current conditions.

news.headline: CUJO AI acquires Domos to enhance network performance, improve user experiences, and unlock revenue streams. LOS ANGELES, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, the fastest rate seen since 1973. Asia-Pacific countries are set to lead this growth with an estimated 7.8% increase, while the United States is expected to see a 6.7% growth. On the other hand, the Eurozone is anticipated to lag behind with only a 4.3% rise. This positive outlook comes after the world economy experienced a 3.5% decline in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The recovery is expected to continue into 2022, although at a slower pace with a projected global growth rate of 4.1%. The report also highlights the importance of vaccinations and policy support in sustaining this economic rebound.
news.headline: Stallion Uranium raises private placement amount to $1.45M.

news.summary: Cboe BZX Exchange has requested clearance from US regulators to list an ETF backed by SUI, the native token of Sui Network, with $6.5 billion market capitalization. If approved by the SEC, the ETF issued by Canary Capital would be the first to hold SUI. Sui, built on Move framework with Rust, aims to offer streamlined user onboarding like Web3. Sui Network has $1.1 billion total value locked (TVL). Canary also filed for PENGU ETF and has proposed others like LTC, XRP, HBAR, AXL, and PENGU. Cboe filed to list SOL ETFs by Franklin Templeton and Fidelity. The SEC has received many ETF filings post-2024, including altcoins like SOL, SUI, DOGE, and TRUMP. However, demand for altcoin ETFs might be weaker than for BTC and ETH funds, as per Sygnum's research head Katalin Tischhauser.
news.headline: Cboe BZX seeks approval to list Canary's SUI ETF, with market cap at $6.5B. SUI Network has $1.1B TVL and uses Move framework.$post-Trump, SEC acknowledges new altcoin ETFs, including Solana and SUI. Demand may be weaker compared to Bitcoin and Ether ETFs.

news.summary: Officials have confirmed that a total of 215 people were affected by the recent food poisoning outbreak in the city. The outbreak was linked to a popular restaurant chain, which has since been shut down for a thorough investigation. So far, 42 individuals have been hospitalized due to severe symptoms, including nausea and vomiting. Health authorities are urging anyone who visited the restaurant in the past week and experienced similar symptoms to seek medical attention immediately. The rest of the victims have reported milder symptoms and are being monitored closely. The restaurant is cooperating with the investigation and has pledged to improve its food safety protocols before reopening to the public.
news.headline: Spain is advocating for EU to shift focus to China to offset Trump tariffs. #trade #Spain #EU #China

news.summary: Individuals undergoing cancer treatment in the United States are finding relief from high costs by utilizing safe and affordable options offered through SaveRxCanada.to. This initiative, based in Vancouver, BC, allows patients to access life-saving oncology medications at significantly reduced prices. As of April 9, 2025, this service has the potential to help patients save thousands of dollars on essential treatments, providing new avenues for those struggling to afford their healthcare needs.
news.headline: Patients in the U.S. can save thousands on cancer drugs with India-approved alternatives from SaveRxCanada.to.
PM Sanchez urges EU to reconsider relationship with China amid rising tensions.

news.summary: On Wednesday, Jared Isaacman, a successful entrepreneur with a net worth exceeding billions, will appear before the Senate for testimony. Isaacman, who has flown to orbit on SpaceX vehicles twice, will share his insights and experiences with the Senate members. The appearance is set to provide valuable information and perspectives on space exploration and commercial spaceflight.
news.headline: Billionaire Jared Isaacman,  nominated by Trump, highlights Mars importance during confirmation hearing. To testify before Senate.

news.summary: The recent implementation of new tariffs by the Trump administration is motivated by a lofty and challenging objective - to completely eradicate the bilateral trade deficit with every trading partner of the United States. This goal, though ambitious, presents a significant challenge due to the substantial deficits with several countries. The move reflects a desire to reconfigure trade relationships with foreign nations and address the trade imbalances that have been a key focus of the current administration.
news.headline: Trump aims to eradicate trade deficits by imposing tariffs - economists question feasibility of eliminating deficits with all US trading partners.

news.summary: The Virtuals Protocol, a platform for creating and monetizing artificial intelligence agents, has seen a significant decline in daily revenue, dropping to just $500 currently from a peak of over $500,000. The platform has undergone a steep decline in AI agent creation, with only one new agent launching in the past week compared to over 1,000 agents a day in late November. The Virtual Protocol token reached an all-time high of $4.61 on Jan. 2 but has since fallen to as low as $0.42, with daily revenue plummeting. The platform has generated a total lifetime revenue of $39.1 million. The overall AI agent market cap is $153.81 million, with $76.6 million allocated to AIXBT, which has dropped 92% since its all-time high. The decline in Virtuals' revenue may be attributed to market conditions and platform terms, with critics highlighting the lack of functionality in AI agents. Despite this, there are differing opinions on the future potential of AI agents, with some foreseeing a possible comeback despite current shortcomings.
news.headline: Virtuals Protocol's revenue hits $500 daily, down 90%. Platform once made over 1,000 agents daily; token falls to $0.42. Lifetime revenue: $39.1M; total AI agent market cap: $153.81M. AI agents criticized for lack of functionality amidst market downturn. Source: Dune Analytics.

news.summary: Luxury goods manufacturers are feeling anxious as tariffs on the European Union come into play. They are worried about the fate of their prized products labeled as "Made in France" or "Made in Italy."
news.headline: EU tariffs worry luxury fashion brands w/ 'Made in France' or 'Made in Italy' products, causing concern among makers.

news.summary: In Yongin, South Korea, on April 9, 2025, GC Biopharma revealed that the Korean Ministry of Food and Drug Safety (MFDS) has given the green light for their anthrax vaccine, BARYTHRAX. This vaccine was a collaborative effort between GC Biopharma and the Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency (KDCA). The approval signifies a major milestone in the development of this vaccine.
news.headline: GC Biopharma's BARYTHRAX, world's first recombinant anthrax vaccine, receives approval from MFDS in South Korea on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established to facilitate safe and hassle-free remittances to users of Weixin Pay in China. Effective from April 8, 2025, individuals utilizing Weixin Pay can receive international transfers from Xoom, a prominent digital remittance provider owned by PayPal. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in enhancing cross-border payment services for Weixin Pay users, offering them increased convenience and security in managing their finances.
news.headline: PayPal's Xoom partners with Tenpay Global to offer cross-border remittances to Weixin Pay users in China.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 8, 2025, Wondershare Filmora, a top video creativity software company, is recognizing the growing importance of storytelling for marketers. They are committed to offering user-friendly yet robust video editing solutions for professionals crafting content for diverse platforms.
news.headline: Wondershare Filmora partners with AMA to empower marketers with creative video storytelling tools.

news.summary: Strategy Inc. took a risk by investing in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and faced the potential of incurring unrealized losses, despite this, co-founder Michael Saylor remains optimistic about the future of the cryptocurrency. The company has purchased a total of 528,185 BTC at an average cost price of $67,458, with the total market value of its holdings reaching $40.16 billion, resulting in a 13% floating profit. However, with the current price of Bitcoin at slightly over $76,000, there is a possibility that a mere 11% drop in the price could shift the firm's gains into losses. Saylor bought 528,185 BTC for $35.63 billion USD, making his average price $67,458. At present, they are 13% away from Saylor's average price.
news.headline: Strategy Inc. holds 528,185 BTC bought at $67,458 with a 13% profit, close to breaking even; Michael Saylor remains confident in Bitcoin's future.

news.summary: Former NBA star Shaquille O'Neal has settled a class-action lawsuit for $11 million with Astrals NFT buyers. Florida federal court judge Federico Moreno approved the settlement in an order on April 8. The deal includes a fund of up to $11 million for eligible class members, $2.9 million in attorney fees, and costs. All buyers of Astrals NFTs from May 2022 to Jan. 15 and those who purchased GLXY tokens until mid-January are eligible. The lawsuit accused O'Neal of promoting an unregistered security with the Solana-based Astrals NFT project, causing buyers to "suffer investment losses." The NFT collection, consisting of 10,000 unique digital collectibles, saw no activity in the past two years. Overall NFT sales have dropped significantly, with just $27 million sold by April 7, down from over $2 billion per week in late 2021.
news.headline: Shaquille O’Neal settles $11M Astrals NFT lawsuit with final court approval for class members; $2.9M in attorney fees.
